docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK. L. AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER, GLEN SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT PORTER, GLEN

3:00 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT L. CLARK, PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED BY JUDGE LABOWITZ, ANA URBINA REPORTER. PLAINTIFF TO HAVE A STIPULATED JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT GLEN PORTER FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 626 POLK STREET #106 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AND FORFEITURE OF THE AGREEMENT UNDER WHICH DEFENDANT HOLDS POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE. PLTF. WAIVES RENT AND DAMAGES. ATTORNEY FEES AND COST ALSO WAIVED. EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION STAYED TO 11/15/93. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. PRIOR POSTING OF WRIT PERMITTED. EACH PARTY TO THIS ACTION RELINQUISHES ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM THIS TENANCY AS TO THE OTHER PARTY.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER, GLEN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK. L.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PORTER, GLEN
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER, GLEN
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER, GLEN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTER, GLEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 626 POLK STREET #106 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, RENT AND DAMAGES ATTORNEY FEES AND COST WAIVED BY PLAINTIFF. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. PRIOR POSTING PERMITTED. EACH PARTY RELINQUISHES ALL CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY ARISING FROM THE TENANCY OF THE DEFENDANT.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT PORTER, GLEN

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK. L. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-27-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-03-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTER, GLEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 626 POOLK STREET #106 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, RENT AND DAMAGES ATTORNEY FEES AND COST WAIVED. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH, PRIOR POSTING PERMITTED. EACH SIDE RELINQUISHES ANY AND ALL CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY KNOWN OR UNKNOWN ARISING FROM TENANCY OF THE DEFENDANT.
